creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
On Sun, 29 Aug 1999, Will Andrews wrote:

> Hello. I have a problem with the apache13-php4 port. It looks like
> the PHP module is depending on a newer version of gd than the ports
> collection has:

Actually, it wants an _older_ version of gd. One that the distributor
of GD has 'pulled off the shelves' because of copyright problems.
